name: copilot-smart-router
description: Automatic model routing for GitHub Copilot Chat – uses the best model for every prompt

chatParticipants.name: smart
chatParticipants.description: Route prompts to the best Copilot model automatically

aiRouter.fastModel.description: Model ID or family name for fast/simple requests (tier 1)

aiRouter.balancedModel.description: Model ID or family name for normal tasks (tier 2)

aiRouter.powerfulModel.description: Model ID or family name for complex tasks (tier 3)

aiRouter.complexityThreshold.description: Minimum complexity score (0-1) to upgrade to a more powerful model

aiRouter.tokenLimitBeforeSummarization.description: Estimated token count after which conversation history will be summarised

aiRouter.enableAutoSummarization.description: Automatically summarise long conversations to save context tokens

aiRouter.workspaceContextMode.description: When to attach workspace files to the request
